title: Climate risk screening for rail asset renewal
summary: Climate projections let infrastructure managers adjust design standards for long-term renewal programmes.
problem: Rail asset renewal programmes plan decades ahead, but standard design parameters often rely on historical climate statistics that no longer reflect projected increases in extreme precipitation, heat and freeze-thaw cycling.
solution: C3S downscaled climate projections provide updated return-period statistics for rainfall, temperature thresholds and frost depth. These translate into adjusted design parameters for drainage, ballast and expansion tolerance, ensuring renewals remain fit for future climate.

copernicusRole.detail: C3S projections are converted into updated return-period statistics and design parameters. Copernicus provides the climate basis; engineering analysis is required to reach design standards.
